understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through the KA59 puzzle levels and win each one by fulfilling the engine’s WIN condition—typically by pushing a movable block onto a goal tile marked with '+', repeating until the final level is completed.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn controlled the currently selected piece (shown as P in the semantic grid, with other selectable pieces as S). MOVE actions attempted to shift the selected piece one cell (3 pixels per cell) in the chosen direction; if a pushable block (B) was adjacent in that direction and the space beyond it was free, it could be pushed along with the mover. Walls (#) and boundaries could block movement, sometimes with non-obvious behavior, so the movement_*_blocked flags were only hints and not guarantees. Control could be switched between selectable pieces using CLICK on the exact pixel/grid coordinate of that piece as listed in the state objects/player.position.
